name: linalg_eigen

description.short: Compute eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a matrix
description.long: Computes the eigenvalue decomposition of a square matrix A, finding λ and v such that Av = λv. Returns complex eigenvalues (even for real matrices) and their corresponding eigenvectors.
description.mathematical: Given A ∈ ℝ^(n×n), find {λᵢ, vᵢ} where Avᵢ = λᵢvᵢ

values.description: Eigenvalues (may be complex even for real input)

cli.output: JSON result with eigenvalues and eigenvectors

special_cases.symmetric_matrix: Eigenvalues are real, eigenvectors are orthogonal
special_cases.identity_matrix: All eigenvalues are 1, eigenvectors form identity

phi_notes: Eigenvalues of phi-scaled matrices exhibit golden ratio relationships. The ratio of successive eigenvalues often approximates φ in natural systems.
references: Golub & Van Loan, Matrix Computations, 4th Edition
